axes.rationale: Load-bearing axis: the case turns on whether bundled components share the same risk / mechanism / authority profile or whether bundling hides asymmetry.

families.description: under-specified, mechanism evaluable only with protocol detail
no specified mechanism that survives physical scrutiny
